name: Only Friends: Dream On
original_name: เล่นกับเพื่อนได้มากกว่าเพื่อน
overview: Senior theater student Jack sets out to create an ambitious stage production, Romeo and Romeo-a bold, male-male re-imagining of the classic Romeo and Juliet. What begins as a dream project soon becomes an emotional minefield when Jack casts friends, exes and their admirers. As rehearsals intensify, unresolved feelings, unspoken crushes, desire, jealousy, and rivalry spiral out of control. Caught between art and emotion, six friends find their relationships tested to the limit.
